user_system_path: Between rungs. The live product thread is the GUARDIAN (workday-presence): it fires, grounds a real commitment, and pings Slack only when it has a reviewable move. Recent shipped work: #402 (send), #404 (attachment rails), #407 (write_document delivery attachment), #411 (Sources MS email fix), #414 (homepage continuity), #417 (continuity sweep — deleted the dead components/layout/ dir, unified the brand mark, type=button on landing demo buttons, dropped 'Legacy' labels, aligned the CTA). The HIGHER-LEVERAGE open thread is owner-side: the owner has 2 real sources connected (Outlook + Gmail) yet the brain is in safe-silence on a pipe-test fixture — the external 15-min guardian cron is not firing (/api/cron/workday-presence-trigger-runner + CRON_SECRET), and/or generation needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + a >=70 move, and/or Slack env (SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, FOLDERA_SLACK_SELF_CHANNEL_ID, FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID). Connect-data playbook delivered to the owner. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Between rungs — only control-plane + docs may change until the owner names the next seam (which re-scopes this contract).
forbidden_files_raw: No product/runtime/schema/deps changes without an active seam + scoped contract.
acceptance_condition: Control plane is consistent in the between-rungs form (build-order active_issue: none, contract active_issue: none, no active-seam line in ACTIVE_HANDOFF) and gate:continuity passes.
stop_condition: Stop when the control plane is rolled forward to a clean between-rungs state and the owner has a boot prompt for the next session.
next_command: OWNER-SIDE (highest leverage): make the guardian fire on the already-connected real sources — configure the external 15-min cron hitting /api/cron/workday-presence-trigger-runner with CRON_SECRET; confirm ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + Slack env (SLACK_BOT_TOKEN, FOLDERA_SLACK_SELF_CHANNEL_ID, FOLDERA_SELF_USER_ID) in Vercel Production. CODE candidates: continue UI polish if more surfaces surface; the paid generator companion-document build.
